findings.claim: scope_conflict_log is empty ([]) yet mandatory Tier 2B scope requirement SR-09 — 'All proposals must allocate tasks for cohesion activities with the European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA) and with the CSA HORIZON-CL4-2025-03-HUMAN-18: GenAI4EU central Hub' — has no documented coverage anywhere in the Phase 2 concept_refinement_summary.json (absent from topic_mapping_rationale, scope_conflict_log, and strategic_differentiation). No tier3_evidence_ref, vocabulary alignment, or conflict resolution record exists for SR-09.
findings.violated_rule: CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 2 gate — gate condition: 'No unresolved scope conflicts remain between the concept and Tier 2B'

findings.claim: scope_conflict_log is empty ([]) yet mandatory Tier 2B scope requirement SR-11 — 'Projects must link to the resources offered by the AI Factories, including the Data Labs' — has no documented coverage anywhere in the Phase 2 concept_refinement_summary.json (absent from topic_mapping_rationale, scope_conflict_log, and strategic_differentiation). No tier3_evidence_ref, vocabulary alignment, or conflict resolution record exists for SR-11.
findings.violated_rule: CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 2 gate — gate condition: 'No unresolved scope conflicts remain between the concept and Tier 2B'

failed.fail_message: Two mandatory Tier 2B scope requirements — SR-09 (ADRA and GenAI4EU Hub cohesion activities) and SR-11 (AI Factories and Data Labs linkage) — have no documented coverage or conflict resolution in the Phase 2 concept_refinement_summary.json, yet the scope_conflict_log records no conflicts, leaving these mandatory requirements unresolved in violation of the CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 2 gate condition.
